steps.title: Recognize the series
steps.content: The sentence lists places where azulejos can be found: libraries, train stations, and public squares. Items in a simple three-part list need commas between them.

steps.title: Use list punctuation
steps.content: Choice A gives no punctuation between list items. Choice B uses a colon where a comma is needed. Choice C uses a dash, which does not fit the simple list. The remaining choice correctly separates libraries from train stations. The answer is D.
